overview.description: World's largest enterprise software vendor with AI embedded across ERP, HCM, and supply chain products
overview.description_long: SAP SE is a German multinational enterprise software company and the world's largest vendor of enterprise application software. SAP's AI strategy, branded as SAP Business AI, embeds AI natively across its suite — including Joule (generative AI copilot), AI capabilities in S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, Ariba, and SAP Business Technology Platform. The company's stated goal is to become the #1 Enterprise Application and Business AI company globally. 98 of the 100 largest companies in the world are SAP customers. SAP's Prague office (Praha 5) serves as a major European development and shared services hub, with active hiring across software development, AI engineering, consulting, and finance roles.

history.origin_story: Founded in 1972 in Weinheim, West Germany by five former IBM employees who wanted to build real-time data processing software for enterprises. Grew from a small German software firm into the world's largest enterprise application software company over five decades.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Weinheim, Germany by five ex-IBM employees
Listed on New York Stock Exchange
S/4HANA launched — next-gen ERP on in-memory HANA database
Joule generative AI copilot launched across SAP suite
Became Europe's most valuable company by market cap; revenue reached €36.8 billion

open_roles.title: Senior AI Developer (Agentic AI and Generative AI)
Senior Data Scientist (Generative AI & LLM Systems)
Senior Agentic AI Product Owner - Employee Digital Experience
SAP iXp Intern - IT Data & Analytics

awards: Europe's most valuable company by market cap (2025)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: SAP's core value lies in deep enterprise integrations, multi-decade customer lock-in, and proprietary business process data — not AI capabilities themselves. However, Microsoft (Copilot for M365/Dynamics) and Oracle directly compete in the ERP+AI space, and generic LLMs are increasingly capable of reasoning over structured business data. SAP's Joule and Business AI are derivative rather than pioneering, which creates real risk if hyperscalers commoditize AI-in-ERP.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: SAP serves the world's largest enterprises in the largest software market. 98 of the 100 largest global companies are customers, and the company reached €36.8B revenue in 2025. Enterprise ERP is a deeply entrenched, recurring-revenue market with high switching costs and multi-year deployment cycles.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: SAP is a publicly traded company (NYSE/Frankfurt, DAX component) with €36.8 billion revenue, €10.3 billion operating income, and Europe's largest market cap. No funding risk whatsoever.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Despite medium AGI displacement risk on AI products specifically, SAP's overall risk is low due to unmatched enterprise scale, customer lock-in across critical business processes, strong financials, and a clear AI roadmap with Joule and SAP Business AI embedded across the suite.

metadata.notes: SAP's Prague office is located at Praha 5, postcode 158 00. 63 open roles confirmed in Prague as of March 2026, including senior AI/ML engineering roles. Global employee count 110,650 and revenue €36.8B/$42.4B from 2025 Wikipedia (citing SAP 2024 Annual Report). sap.com itself blocks automated access (403 errors), so website data sourced via Wikipedia and jobs portal.
